description: Configure Blender to produce a technical line drawing of the BMW car model using the Freestyle rendering engine. The setup must use a black (RGB 0, 0, 0) line color with a thickness between 2.0 and 5.0 pixels against a white (RGB 1, 1, 1) world background. Set the render resolution to 1920x1080. Export the rendered image to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/line_art_render.png and save the project file to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/freestyle_setup.blend.
